NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF UTAH STATE ROUTE 111 AND NEW BINGHAM HIGHWAY...ROCKY MOUNTAIN POWER REPORTS AN ESTIMATED 37 TRANSMISSION POLES AND 23 DISTRIBUTION POLES WERE KNOCKED DOWN...KNOCKING OUT POWER TO APPROXIMATELY 3000 CUSTOMERS. DOWNED POWER LINES ALSO DRAGGED A COUPLE OF METAL POLES SUPPORTING TRAFFIC SIGNALS TO THE GROUND. TWO SENSORS IN THE AREA...AT SR-85 AT DANNON WAY AND AT THE TRANS-JORDAN LANDFILL...RECORDED PEAK WIND GUSTS OF 45 MPH AND 42 MPH RESPECTIVELY.
